concerns.text: Cross-story data dependencies violate independence claim. US2 (T023) requires merged_monthly.csv from US1 (T012), and US3 (T037/T038) requires Correlation Result from US2 (T023). The plan states 'User stories can then proceed in parallel' but this is false - US2 cannot start until US1 completes, and US3 cannot start until US2 completes.

[P] tags on T042, T043, T047, T049 are misleading. These tasks depend on earlier phase outputs (test files, implementation scripts, data files, state YAML). While they're in Phase 6 after all implementation, the [P] tag suggests no dependencies which is incorrect.

Redundant URL verification tasks. T008 (Phase 2) creates URL verification script, and T048 (Phase 6) verifies dataset URLs again. T048 should be removed or T008 should be the sole URL verification task.
Task numbering has gaps: T015-T022 missing between Phase 3 and Phase 4, T026-T036 missing between Phase 4 and Phase 5. This is confusing for traceability.
